item.title: Shrimp & Crab Biscuit Melts: A Cozy, Seafood-Packed Comfort Dish
item.description: These biscuit melts combine tender shrimp and crab with melty cheese inside flaky, buttery biscuits. The secret is a quick garlic butter sauce that makes them extra rich. Great for a cozy dinner or weekend brunch! | ⏱️ Prep: 15min | Cook: 30min | Serves: 4 | #cat1761230383494 #Mediumpost #1hourmeals #post #cooking
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 45 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Medium

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 cup cooked shrimp, peeled and chopped
  • 1 cup cooked crab meat, picked over for shells
  • 8 large buttermilk biscuits, split
  • 1 cup shredded sharp cheddar cheese
  • 4 tablespoons unsalted butter
  • 2 cloves garlic, minced
  • 2 tablespoons mayonnaise
  • 1 tablespoon lemon juice
  • 1 teaspoon Old Bay seasoning
  • Salt and black pepper to taste
  • 2 tablespoons chopped fresh parsley

👩‍🍳 Instructions
